description_long: This is a modern grave monument composed of a rectangular granite base supporting a two-part upright headstone. The base is made of light gray, speckled granite with a polished finish, and features a slightly raised platform. The headstone consists of two black granite slabs of different heights, one of which is engraved with gold inscriptions and a gold Latin cross. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, with clean lines and a strong contrast between the black and gray stone. The monument is solid and heavy, intended for permanent installation in a cemetery or memorial park. The inscriptions and cross add a solemn and respectful touch to the otherwise contemporary structure.
description: A modern grave monument with a light gray granite base and two black granite headstones, one engraved with gold text and a cross.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two black granite headstones, one taller than the other, set on a gray granite base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstones and the layered structure of the gray granite base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engraved gold cross and inscriptions on the right headstone, with the full length of the grave visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the headstones and the extended granite base.
